{{Infobox technique
| name = Hollow Armor
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Hollow Armor is an [[Enforcer technique]] that allows a user to protect and empower their physical form using [[madra]]. While the specific appearance and function of the armor vary depending on an individual's [[madra]], it generally manifests as a suit of plates or a shimmering layer covering the body. The technique provides significant defensive capabilities, such as resisting physical strikes and elemental attacks, but it functions by consuming the user's [[madra]] reserves. Consequently, the armor remains active only as long as the user has sufficient energy; once depleted, the armor must be dropped. Some advanced iterations of this technique involve complex layering or specialized components, such as the [[Hollow King's Crown]] or [[Mantle]], which can be used to facilitate powerful offensive maneuvers and specialized combat roles.}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Hollow Armor]] is an [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]'s [[Hollow Armor]] has a formless version that covers his skin with [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] possesses [[Hollow Armor]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] surrounded himself with the [[Hollow Armor]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] used [[Hollow Armor]] to defend against lightning.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
